data.body: SESSION 2 COMPLETE — EPIC 9d50 (unrational-expansive-catfish) CLOSED + SIGNED. All 10 leaves implemented, closed+signed, and LANDED on main (10-change Gerrit stack 608-617 all MERGED via the FFO land-loop, which caught a quiet origin/main window in cycle 2). Epic AC2 measurement-framework comment recorded (baseline 0-blocks/162 + ~13-advisories/round; re-runnable code_review_result_v1 block/false-block + plan_review_result_v1 norm_id-survival queries; g7-promotion-path.md fire-rate query; b9c0 0.54 PROVISIONAL caveat). Epic closed+signed (certifiable:true). 72b6 closed handled-by-process (operator decision; documented, next-calibration picks it up); epic AC3 amended to match. Session-2 additions this run: a8e5 (Pass-2 grounding: absence veto + DET hygiene backstop + operator-attested AC awareness + E2/F1/E6 ADR-0043 vocab + coach move 14 + f1fa regression fixture) and d4cf (G7 leaf-parent-containment AGENT criterion + require_parent_id axis + rubric + coach move 13 + g7 semantic eval + promotion-path doc), both under held-out TDD with mutation checks. All completion-verifier FAILs along the way were genuine gaps fixed (never weakened a test). origin/main confirmed to contain all 10 changes. DONE.
